items.name: acrylic
items.title: Acrylic Theme
items.description: The Acrylic-owned theme tokens lifted from the Apple macOS 26 UI Kit: the frosted --acr-* surface/control/material tokens, the macOS system color spectrum (--acr-red/blue/green/...), the SF Pro type scale, and the macOS thin scrollbar utility. Light + dark + acrylic. Deliberately does NOT ship the standard shadcn semantic vars (--primary/--background/--foreground/--destructive/--ring/--border): those belong to the consuming app's theme, so installing an Acrylic component inherits the host's brand colors instead of overwriting them. Every Acrylic component references this, so it is pulled in automatically as a dependency.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Dark frosted-glass (acrylic) surface card — a charcoal translucent pane over a blurred backdrop. Flat at rest, soft float shadow + lift on hover (interactive). Composes into list rows, tiles, and panels.

items.name: media-box
items.title: Media Box
items.description: A measured image/video frame with rounded clipping, poster fallback, stable sizing rules, and a children overlay slot for player controls. It does not own playback state.

items.name: badge
items.title: Acrylic Badge
items.description: A small pill label — shadcn's Badge with its base styling copied verbatim (shape, sizing, focus ring, the six variants), recolored to the Acrylic theme tokens: accent default, neutral-chip secondary, system-red destructive, hairline outline. Flips light/dark via the theme.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Acrylic Breadcrumb
items.description: shadcn's Breadcrumb, anatomy and API unchanged. Already token-driven (list on --muted-foreground, current page on --foreground, links hover to --foreground), so it flips light/dark/acrylic for free; the only acrylic touch is the separator/ellipsis glyphs on --label-tertiary so the chevrons read one step quieter than the links.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Acrylic Dialog
items.description: Radix Dialog dressed as a frosted-acrylic modal: a 72px blur+saturate overlay and a translucent panel (20px radius, macOS 26 metrics). The close (X) reuses the acrylic Button (ghost icon) and is not auto-focused on open; toggle it with showCloseButton. Drop-in replacement for the shadcn Dialog.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Acrylic Alert Dialog
items.description: Frosted confirm dialog — the AlertDialog counterpart of the acrylic Dialog (72px blur overlay + translucent panel). Modeled on the macOS 26 Alerts page: 26px panel radius and action/cancel buttons that reuse the acrylic Button (buttonVariants) at the kit's large size. Shares the Dialog's ref-counted body-paint so it can stack on a Dialog without either losing its frost.

items.name: button
items.title: Acrylic Button
items.description: Button lifted from the Apple macOS 26 UI Kit: a solid prominent default plus tinted secondary, destructive, neutral, and borderless ghost variants, in the five macOS control sizes (16/20/24/28/36) with kit-exact per-size radii and a round icon size. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens; asChild via Radix Slot.

items.name: input
items.title: Acrylic Input
items.description: Input lifted from the Apple macOS 26 UI Kit Text Field: a solid control-surface field with a hairline border and an accent focus ring, in the five macOS control sizes (16/20/24/28/36) with kit-exact per-size radii (uniform ~height/4). Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens. Compose a leading icon by wrapping.

items.name: searchbar
items.title: Acrylic Searchbar
items.description: Searchbar component designed in accordance with the Apple macOS 26 UI Kit Search Field: capsule-rounded edges, magnifying glass search icon, clear button, five sizes, and default vs over-glass variants.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Acrylic Sonner
items.description: Sonner toasts restyled as the macOS 26 notification banner: a 344px frosted-acrylic card (--acr-toast + backdrop-blur), 16px radius, SFPro-Bold/13 title, top-center. Theme-provider-agnostic — reads the active theme from the `.dark` class on <html> (works with next-themes, shadcn's Vite ThemeProvider, or a single-theme app) so there's no next-themes dependency or import swap. Inherits the host font. Mount the <Toaster /> once near the app root, then call toast() from sonner.

items.name: popover
items.title: Acrylic Popover
items.description: Frosted floating panel (translucent material + backdrop-blur) — the dropdown surface for Combobox and other overlays. Radix Popover under the hood.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Acrylic Hover Card
items.description: Frosted floating card revealed on hover (translucent material + backdrop-blur) — a peek panel for previews and rich link cards. Radix HoverCard under the hood.

items.name: command
items.title: Acrylic Command
items.description: cmdk command list styled for the frosted popover surface — accessible keyboard nav + filtering for Combobox and command palettes.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Acrylic Combobox
items.description: The macOS 26 Combo Box: an editable, searchable select. An Input-styled trigger with a chevron opens a frosted Popover holding a filterable Command list, in the five macOS control sizes. Assembled from Input + Popover + Command.

items.name: field
items.title: Acrylic Field
items.description: Form field layout family from the macOS 26 Forms page, mapped to the shadcn Field API: Field/FieldLabel/FieldTitle/FieldDescription/FieldError/FieldContent/FieldGroup/FieldSet/FieldLegend/FieldSeparator. Vertical/horizontal/responsive orientation; hairline separators at the kit's 5% rhythm. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Acrylic Input Group
items.description: Composable input container (shadcn InputGroup) styled to match the Input: InputGroup/InputGroupInput/InputGroupTextarea/InputGroupAddon/InputGroupButton/InputGroupText. Addons align inline-start/inline-end/block-start/block-end; InputGroupTextarea supports autoResize + maxRows (supersedes the old AutoTextarea).

items.name: item
items.title: Acrylic Item
items.description: A flexible shadcn Item row for settings, files, people, notifications, and compact object summaries. Preserves the upstream Item composition API (Item/ItemMedia/ItemHeader/ItemContent/ItemTitle/ItemDescription/ItemActions/ItemFooter/ItemGroup/ItemSeparator) and maps row surfaces, borders, and compact typography to the Acrylic token language.

items.name: slider
items.title: Acrylic Slider
items.description: Radix Slider aligned to the macOS 26 Sliders page: a capsule translucent rail, an accent-blue filled range, and a frosted-white pill knob with a hairline border + soft shadow, in five control sizes. Two kit variants — standard and center-biased fill — plus the Ticked add-on (marks), range (two-thumb), stepping, vertical orientation, and disabled. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: audio-player
items.title: Audio Player
items.description: A floating capsule transport (Apple-Music mini-player) on the acrylic frosted surface. Two groups: an always-on transport (prev/play/next + your own right-side tools) and a now-playing info group (cover + title + artist + seek rail) that appears only while a track is loaded, with the seek bar along the group's bottom edge. Fully controlled via callbacks; an optional volume control reveals a vertical Slider on hover (portaled via HoverCard so it escapes clipping containers). Flips light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: switch
items.title: Acrylic Switch
items.description: On/off toggle from the macOS 26 Toggles page: a capsule rail (gray off / accent-blue on) with a white knob, in five control sizes. Radix Switch; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Acrylic Radio Group
items.description: Radio buttons from the macOS 26 Toggles page: a circular control (gray unselected / accent-filled with a white center dot when selected), in five sizes. Radix RadioGroup; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Acrylic Stepper
items.description: macOS 26 Stepper: a number readout plus a chevron up/down bezel stack (kit radii 4/5/6/7/9), controlled with value/min/max/step. Auto-disables at bounds, keyboard arrow support; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: select
items.title: Acrylic Select
items.description: The macOS 26 Pop-up Button as a Select: a flat control-surface trigger with the up/down chevron (kit radii 4/5/6/14/18) opening a frosted popover of items, in five sizes. Radix Select; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Acrylic Button Group
items.description: Button Group aligned to the macOS 26 Segmented Controls — group buttons into a rounded gray well. Variants: attached (flush + hairline dividers), ghost (flush + hairline dividers with no well background), segmented (active item as a raised white pill), split (gapped); horizontal/vertical. Five kit sizes (mini/small/medium/large/xl — height 16/20/24/28/36, radius 4/5/6/14/18) set once via the size prop, scaling the well, segments, sliding pill and dividers. Exports ButtonGroup/ButtonGroupItem/ButtonGroupToggle/ButtonGroupSeparator/ButtonGroupText. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Acrylic Context Menu
items.description: The macOS 26 Menu (right-click / control-click) on the frosted Popover material — the same glass as Combobox/Select. 13px SF-Medium rows lifted from the kit's 13pt Menu: a 6px-radius highlight bar, a section header, checkbox + radio items, submenus with a trailing chevron, a hairline separator, a muted keyboard-shortcut column, and a destructive row. Radix Context Menu; colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Acrylic Avatar
items.description: shadcn's Avatar copied verbatim (Radix, with its built-in image-load / initials-fallback handling), recolored to the Acrylic tokens — the fallback sits on the neutral chip. Default circular (macOS user pictures); pass rounded-lg for the squircle. Powers the Sidebar footer user item.

items.name: separator
items.title: Acrylic Separator
items.description: A hairline divider on the Acrylic border token (--acr-border). Radix Separator; horizontal or vertical. Used by Sidebar and form layouts.

items.name: table
items.title: Acrylic Table
items.description: A data table — shadcn's Table restyled to the Acrylic material: flat/transparent (composes inside Card), hairline row separators on --acr-border-soft, muted subheadline column labels, and a spring-wired hover tint. Pure CSS, no dependencies.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Acrylic Skeleton
items.description: A pulsing placeholder block on the neutral-chip token (--acr-chip) for loading states.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Acrylic Spinner
items.description: A smooth, modern circular loading indicator with a track and an active animating stroke.

items.name: shell
items.title: Acrylic Shell
items.description: A composable macOS app shell around the Acrylic Sidebar, with inset panels, navbars, and scrollable content for Mail, Notes, or custom app frames.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Acrylic Tooltip
items.description: A small frosted-acrylic tooltip (--acr-panel + backdrop-blur), 11px label, hairline ring + soft shadow. Radix Tooltip; powers the Sidebar's collapsed-icon labels.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Acrylic Sheet
items.description: A frosted-acrylic side drawer (--acr-panel + backdrop-blur) sliding from any edge, over a blurred overlay. Radix Dialog under the hood; used by the Sidebar's mobile off-canvas mode.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Acrylic Sidebar
items.description: The macOS 26 sidebar — shadcn's Sidebar composition (Provider with cookie state + ⌘B toggle, off-canvas/icon/none collapse, mobile Sheet, groups, menu/sub-menu, rail, inset) restyled to the kit: a 240px frosted-vibrancy panel (--acr-surface + backdrop-blur), three densities (Small 24/11, Medium 32/13, Large 40/15) on the menu-button sm/default/lg sizes, and an accent-pill selected row. Colors flip light/dark via the Acrylic theme tokens.

items.name: backdrop
items.title: Acrylic Backdrop
items.description: The body-level base layer the frosted acrylic chrome blurs over. A fixed, full-bleed wallpaper that paints only under the Acrylic theme on the web; hidden in plain light/dark, and hidden again under native (Tauri) vibrancy so the OS material shows instead. Acrylic regions are translucent and reveal it; light/dark regions are opaque and cover it. Pass children for a custom wallpaper.
